<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Event\Code; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class Phpt extends Test { public function isPhpt(): true { return true; } /** * @return non-empty-string */ public function id(): string { return $this->file(); } /** * @return non-empty-string */ public function name(): string { return $this->file(); } }
